title: licania boyanii
intro: Licania boyanii, also known as "Bois de pan pan" or "Pan pan tree", is a tropical plant species belonging to the family Chrysobalanaceae, native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Licania boyanii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to leverage its medicinal properties.
